_comment: HO 107 — LA Senate 2026 runoff seed. Hand-curated because the June 27 runoff has no results yet and Ballotpedia has not built the Democratic runoff page. When a real Ballotpedia runoff scraper lands (post-June-27 handoff), it overwrites/retires this file. See SKILL.md 'Runoff tracking'.
source: Ballotpedia + LA news coverage of the May 16, 2026 closed primary (Cassidy eliminated; both parties to a June 27 runoff).
